title: Did Tapestry Just Become A Dip Buying Opportunity?
text: Shares of Tapestry Inc. NYSE: TPR, owned by high-end luxury brands like Kate Spade and Coach, have declined nearly 20% in the past two weeks. The dire price movement came just after news leaked that Capri Holdings NYSE: CPRI was to be bought out by Tapestry, and some investors raised an eyebrow at the price tag.

title: Tapestry: Coach owner on back foot as earnings fall shy of expectations
text: Coach parent Tapestry Inc (NYSE:TPR) stock was on the back foot in Thursday's premarket, reporting its fourth-quarter earnings slightly light of market expectations. It comes against a more challenging backdrop for luxury brands, albeit Tapestry remains bullish enough in the sector to last week agree the acquisition of Michael Kors and Jimmy Choo owner Capri in a US$8.5 billion deal.

title: Coach Parent Tapestry Slides After Earnings Miss, Weak Guidance
text: Tapestry posted fourth-quarter earnings of 95 cents a share, while Wall Street was expecting 97 cents.

title: Tapestry's stock slides premarket after earnings lag consensus
text: Tapestry Inc.'s stock TPR, -3.00% slid 2.4% in premarket trade Thursday, after the parent of Coach, Kate Space and Stuart Wetizman posted weaker-than-expected earnings for its fiscal fourth quarter and offered guidance that lagged estimates. The New York-based company, which last week announced plans to acquire Capri Inc. for $8.5 billion, posted net income of $224 million, or 95 cents a share, for the quarter to July 1, up from $189 million, or 75 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: CAPRI HOLDINGS INVESTOR ALERT by the Former Attorney General of Louisiana: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates Adequacy of Price and Process in Proposed Sale of Capri Holdings Limited - CPRI
text: NEW ORLEANS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Former Attorney General of Louisiana Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq. and the law firm of Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (“KSF”) are investigating the proposed sale of Capri Holdings Limited (NYSE: CPRI) to Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR). Under the terms of the proposed transaction, shareholders of Capri will receive $57.00 in cash for each share of Capri that they own. KSF is seeking to determine whether this consideration and the process that led to it are adequate, or whether.

title: Tapestry, Inc. Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR), a house of iconic accessories and lifestyle brands consisting of Coach, Kate Spade, and Stuart Weitzman, announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.35 per common share. The dividend is payable on September 25, 2023 to shareholders of record as of the close of business on September 8, 2023. title: Moody's puts Tapestry's rating on review for a possible downgrade after $8.5 billion Capri deal
text: Moody's Investors Service placed Tapestry Inc.'s Baa2 rating on review for a possible downgrade on Thursday, after the company said it's buying Capri, the parent of Michael Kors, for about $8.5 billion in a deal that will be mostly funded with debt. the move “reflects governance considerations, including the significant increase in debt with the Capri acquisition and Tapestry's new leverage target, which will drive a sustained increase relative to the company's typical under 1x net debt/EBITDA,” Moody's said in a statement.

title: Tapestry: Navigating Luxury Retail Landscape Well
text: Tapestry is positioned well in the fashion industry due to its strong brands Coach and Kate Spade, with Coach showing signs of improved growth. Margins have remained stable, but improvement in the performance of Kate Spade could lead to an overall improvement. This would further widen its superiority over peers. The business does have execution risk with delivering improvement and is facing slowing growth, but we believe this is sufficiently priced in.

title: Tapestry, Inc. to Host FY23 Fourth Quarter and Year-End Earnings Call
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--On Thursday, August 17, 2023 at 8:00 a.m. (ET), Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR) will hold a conference call to discuss the Company's fiscal 2023 fourth quarter and year-end results which will be reported via press release earlier that morning. To listen to this Tapestry conference call, please dial 1-866-847-4217 or 1-203-518-9845 and provide the Conference ID 7066557. To listen to the audio webcast, please visit www.tapestry.com/investors. A telephone replay will be avail.

title: Barclays Upgrades Tapestry
